expectations.evidence: File uses free-form markdown starting with '# Product Requirement Document: VetBook', not product "..." { structured syntax
Section 2 uses 'For Pet Owners' and 'For Veterinary Clinics' bullet lists plus a 'Market Gap' paragraph; no situation/complication/question structure
3 personas defined: Persona 1 (Pet Owner 'Sophie'), Persona 2 (Clinic Manager 'Dr. Marc Lefebvre'), Persona 3 (Receptionist 'Amina')
Section 3 'Primary Goals' table has 5 goals with Metric, Target, and Timeframe columns (e.g. 500 active clinics in 12 months)
Section 5 'Out of Scope (v1.0)' lists 8 items including telemedicine, online payment, insurance integration, etc.
No assumptions section found in the document
Section 13 'Risks and Mitigations' table lists 6 risks (low clinic adoption, cold start, GDPR non-compliance, competition, data breach, SMS delivery failures)
Section 15 'Release Plan' defines 4 releases: MVP (v1.0), v1.1, v1.2, v2.0
